title: Bombay High Court questions legality of AI tools that simulate celebrity personalities without consent
description: The Bombay High Court on Wednesday questioned the legality of Artificial Intelligence (AI) tools that simulate celebrity personalities without consent [Shilpa Shetty v. getoutlive.in & Ors].The Court asked how platforms could allow users to “have a chat” with an AI version of an actor without consent from the concerned celebrity.The observations were made during the hearing of actor Shilpa Shetty Kundra’s personality rights suit against the alleged misuse of her image and deepfake conte
